descriptionZh: 摩洛哥在2022年世界杯上创造历史成为首支晋级四强的非洲球队。阿什拉夫、齐耶赫等球星领衔的阿特拉斯雄狮实力强劲，在雷格拉吉的带领下继续追求突破。
descriptionEn: Morocco made history at the 2022 World Cup by becoming the first African nation to reach the semi-finals. Led by stars like Hakimi and Ziyech under Regragui, the Atlas Lions continue to push boundaries.
